description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fixed a critical LWJGL-OpenGL mapping error  
2. Fixed an issue where version 1.7.2 could not start properly  
3. Fixed VulkanMod failing to run due to missing UNSAFE  
4. Removed the Pojav warning screen for Create  
5. Fixed JarExecutor issues related to automatic Java selection  
6. Fixed an issue where JourneyMap prevented the game from starting in some versions (though rendering errors persist)

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复严重的LWJGL-OpenGL映射错误
2.修复1.7.2无法正常启动的问题
3.修复VulkanMod因缺少UNSAFE而无法运行的问题
4.去除Create的Pojav警告界面
5.修复JarExecutor自动选择Java相关问题
6.修复部分版本JourneyMap导致游戏无法启动的问题（但是仍有渲染错误）
